title: sceptridium ternatum
intro: Sceptridium ternatum, also known as Three-leafed Sceptridium or Tong-ling-teng in Chinese, is a type of plant species in the family Asparagaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sceptridium ternatum include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and aid in digestion, as well as its potential to improve immune function and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, Sceptridium ternatum is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or powders, and is commonly combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
